summary: Owner dashcam: FSD v13.2.2 in Santa Monica steers onto Metro E Line street-running light-rail tracks; driver disengages and runs a red light to escape an approaching train.
notes: ORIGINAL owner video (Rabbit CEO). Distinct from foggy Ohio / West Covina gate incidents. Handle was historically jessechenglyu; canonical is jesselyu. Verified via fxtwitter + NY Post/SFGATE.

summary: Austin Robotaxi ride video: safety monitor intervenes when the vehicle fails to respond as railroad crossing lights activate and gate arms begin lowering with a train approaching.
notes: ORIGINAL rider video with onboard footage. Cited by Fortune and NBC. Distinct robotaxi (not consumer FSD owner dashcam). Not an alias of West Covina/foggy.

summary: Owner dashcam on FSD 13.2.9: car stops at an active railroad crossing, then proceeds toward lowering/lowered gates when a downstream traffic light turns green; driver intervenes as a train arrives seconds later.
notes: ORIGINAL video post. NBC and Futurism cite this clip (sometimes via ronnotel/status/… URL that resolves to Optionnaire). Distinct from West Covina smash-through and foggy Ohio.

summary: Denver FSD Beta clip: vehicle attempts a left turn directly into the path of an oncoming light-rail train despite visualization showing the train; driver intervenes.
notes: Viral ORIGINAL/clip post by Taylor Ogan (also covered via JustSubscribe/Beta Tech OG YouTube full drive). Distinct incident. Prefer this X video post over later YouTube reuploads.

summary: Owner reply with video: FSD Supervised 14.2.2 correctly stops at a railroad crossing—owner notes it was a first for them.
notes: ORIGINAL owner video (reply to @TeslaNewswire). Positive/handled counterexample useful for catalog balance. Low engagement but verified video.
